ksa_text: Knowledge of data privacy and protection techniques as applied to data architecture, including data masking, tokenization, anonymization, pseudonymization, and privacy-by-design architectural patterns.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure security design and cybersecurity development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of security implementation) and updated as necessary.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks and benefits from third-party entities are managed.

top_anchors.element_label: Ensure security design and cybersecurity development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of security implementation) and updated as necessary.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-K-012 (DA, Knowledge) maps to Data Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4448 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: dcwf=0.445, nice=0.435, ddat=0.433. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within analytics and business intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4448 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DA-K-012 (DA, composite 0.4448) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles does not surface this DA-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4448 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DA domain content at composite 0.4448 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4448, domain DA. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
